description: A mashed avocado dish traditionally combined with ingredients such as lime, onion, cilantro, chili, and salt. It is commonly served as a dip, topping, or side.
preparation_steps: Mash ripe avocado to the desired texture.
Mix in lime juice and salt.
Add optional ingredients such as onion, tomato, cilantro, and chili.
Serve fresh, as avocado browns over time.

nutrition.fat: Moderate to high, mostly unsaturated fat

health_advice.benefits: Provides fiber and mostly unsaturated fats from avocado.
health_advice.risks: Portion size matters because avocado is energy-dense, and salty chips can increase sodium intake.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Serve with vegetables, moderate portions of chips, or use it as a topping instead of a heavy creamy sauce.

dietary_notes.note: Typically vegan and gluten-free when served plain; pairings such as flavored chips may change this.

allergens: Usually none in the dip itself; packaged seasonings or chips may introduce allergens

serving_info.typical_serving: A few spoonfuls to a small bowl
